calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2007 Continued To Oct-05-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Aug-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
John Frye, Esq. for Plaintiff: Charles Farrugia, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, and matter submitted.
The Court taken the matter under submission for review.
Counsel to prepare and submit a Proposed Judgment.

Aug. 10, 2007
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court.
The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Joseph Martin Wong as follows:
Damages $350,000.00
Costs $404.500, for a total of $350404.50
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2007 Continued To Aug-17-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2007 Continued To Jun-08-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
